rationale: No qualitative change in Romania's immediate security environment; Iran deal proximity is the main indirect factor via energy prices.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported near; Israel strikes Lebanon continue
top_events.summary: Potential deal could reduce energy costs for Romania, but remains unconfirmed. Black Sea security environment unchanged this cycle.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues near Romanian border
top_events.summary: No new escalation near Romania's border this cycle; war remains background threat to Black Sea security and regional stability.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricts Anthropic AI access for non-US users; minor indirect impact on Romanian tech sector and businesses relying on US AI tools.
